headline: Micron stock sends a strong signal amid chip shortage
summary: Micron Technology stock went parabolic last week, rising 15% in a single session on May 8. Over the last five trading sessions, the chip stock has risen almost 40% and returned 137% year-to-date. Valued at amarket cap of $729 billion, Micron (MU) is among the largest semiconductor companies ...
